    • services/api/noteService
    • NoteService

    Variable NoteServiceConst

    NoteService: {
        addLinkItem(
            data: { label: string | null; noteID: string; url: string | null },
        ): Promise<any>;
        addNote(
            data: {
                folderID: string | null;
                name: string;
                workspaceID: string | null;
            },
        ): Promise<any>;
        addTextBlock(
            data: {
                codeLanguage: string | null;
                content: string | null;
                name: string | null;
                noteID: string;
                type: number;
            },
        ): Promise<any>;
        deleteLinkItem(linkItemID: string): Promise<any>;
        deleteNote(noteID: string): Promise<any>;
        deleteTextBlock(textblockID: string): Promise<any>;
        getAllNotesOfUser(): Promise<any>;
        getAllNotesOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>;
        getLinkItemsOfNote(noteID: string): Promise<any>;
        getNoteCountOfUser(): Promise<number>;
        getNoteCountOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<number>;
        getNoteWithID(noteID: string): Promise<any>;
        getSpaceInfosOfNote(noteID: string): Promise<WorkspaceDTO>;
        getTextBlocksOfNote(noteID: string): Promise<any>;
        saveNote(
            data: { folderID?: string; id: string; name?: string },
        ): Promise<any>;
        saveTextBlock(block: Note_TextBlock): Promise<any>;
    } = ...

    Client for the note endpoints: notes and their modules (text blocks, link items), plus queries. Methods throw on a non-OK response.

    Type Declaration

    • addLinkItem: function
      • addLinkItem(
            data: { label: string | null; noteID: string; url: string | null },
        ): Promise<any>

        Appends a link item module (labelled URL) to a note.

        Parameters

        • data: { label: string | null; noteID: string; url: string | null }

          The parent note, optional label and the URL.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The created link item.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:81
    • addNote: function
      • addNote(
            data: {
                folderID: string | null;
                name: string;
                workspaceID: string | null;
            },
        ): Promise<any>

        Creates a new (empty) note, optionally inside a folder and/or workspace.

        Parameters

        • data: { folderID: string | null; name: string; workspaceID: string | null }

          Note fields (name, optional folder and workspace).

        Returns Promise<any>

        The created note.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:22
    • addTextBlock: function
      • addTextBlock(
            data: {
                codeLanguage: string | null;
                content: string | null;
                name: string | null;
                noteID: string;
                type: number;
            },
        ): Promise<any>

        Appends a text block module to a note.

        Parameters

        • data: {
              codeLanguage: string | null;
              content: string | null;
              name: string | null;
              noteID: string;
              type: number;
          }

          The parent note, block type (0 = text, 1 = code) and content.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The created text block.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:50
    • deleteLinkItem: function
      • deleteLinkItem(linkItemID: string): Promise<any>

        Deletes a single link item from its note.

        Parameters

        • linkItemID: string

          The link item to delete.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The server confirmation payload.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:205
    • deleteNote: function
      • deleteNote(noteID: string): Promise<any>

        Deletes a note together with all of its modules.

        Parameters

        • noteID: string

          The note to delete.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The server confirmation payload.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:169
    • deleteTextBlock: function
      • deleteTextBlock(textblockID: string): Promise<any>

        Deletes a single text block from its note.

        Parameters

          The text block to delete.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The server confirmation payload.

    • getAllNotesOfUser: function
      • getAllNotesOfUser(): Promise<any>

        Returns all of the current user's personal notes.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The list of notes.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:224
    • getAllNotesOfWorkspace: function
      • getAllNotesOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns all notes of a workspace.

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace whose notes are requested.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The list of notes.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:242
    • getLinkItemsOfNote: function
      • getLinkItemsOfNote(noteID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns all link items of a note, in display order.

        Parameters

        • noteID: string

          The note whose link items are requested.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The ordered link items.

    • getNoteCountOfUser: function
      • getNoteCountOfUser(): Promise<number>

        Returns the number of the current user's personal notes.

        Returns Promise<number>

        The note count.

    • getNoteCountOfWorkspace: function
      • getNoteCountOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<number>

        Returns the number of notes in a workspace.

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace to count notes for.

        Returns Promise<number>

        The note count.

    • getNoteWithID: function
      • getNoteWithID(noteID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns a single note (metadata only) by its ID.

        Parameters

        • noteID: string

          The note to look up.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The note.

    • getSpaceInfosOfNote: function

        Returns the workspace a note belongs to.

          The note whose workspace is requested.

        Returns Promise<WorkspaceDTO>

        The workspace.

    • getTextBlocksOfNote: function
      • getTextBlocksOfNote(noteID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns all text blocks of a note, in display order.

          The note whose text blocks are requested.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The ordered text blocks.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:312
    • saveNote: function
      • saveNote(data: { folderID?: string; id: string; name?: string }): Promise<any>

        Updates a note (only provided fields change; an empty folder moves it to the root).

        Parameters

        • data: { folderID?: string; id: string; name?: string }

          The note ID plus the fields to change.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The updated note.

        • Defined in services/api/noteService.ts:110
    • saveTextBlock: function
      • saveTextBlock(block: Note_TextBlock): Promise<any>

        Updates a text block (content, type, position, collapsed state, …).

        Parameters

        • block: Note_TextBlock

          The full text block to persist.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The updated text block.
